title: Descriptors
description: The descriptive layer attached to a product: highlights, Q&A pairs, use cases, intent tags, and competitive differentiators. All fields are optional — a partially populated descriptors object is conformant.

highlights.description: Standalone descriptive claims about the product.

qa_pairs.description: Pre-answered questions a shopper might ask.

use_cases.description: Concrete situations the product is suited to.

intent_tags.description: Shopping-intent labels drawn from the companion taxonomy (see `taxonomy/`). Open vocabulary; implementations MAY use values outside the taxonomy.

differentiators.description: Comparative claims positioning the product against alternatives.
